text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Morning, Trainer! Are you ready to see me fly?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Today's the Kikuka Sho! No more practicing—this
is the real deal! ☆
choice_data_list: Show them how hard you've been working!
Show them how hard you've been working!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
The only thing left on the turf will be my vapor
trail! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I'll steal your attention and your heart, Trainer! ♪
